decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with low-cost flying creatures and utilizing buffs and protection spells to maintain advantage. By utilizing a mix of evasive creatures and tempo spells, the deck aims to attack aggressively and disrupt opponents' game plans. The mana base is structured to ensure consistency in casting spells while also providing access to different colors of mana when needed. Overall, the strategy revolves around overwhelming opponents with a fast and efficient aggro game plan fueled by flying creatures and support spells.

This deck relies on a fast and aggressive playstyle, utilizing creatures like Bloodghast and Marauding Mako to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also incorporates a mix of burn spells and combat tricks to control the board and push through damage. The mana base is carefully crafted to support the aggressive strategy, allowing for consistent casting of spells and creatures. By combining efficient creatures with powerful spells, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and close out games quickly before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on utilizing cheap spells and creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent with damage. It includes efficient removal spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board, while also having card draw and counter spells to maintain tempo. Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off provide consistent damage output, with support from spells like Flow State and Stormchaser's Talent. The deck aims to win through aggression and efficiency, utilizing the UR color combination's strengths in both burn spells and tempo plays. The mana base is built to ensure consistent access to both colors of mana.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Omniscience combo to play powerful creatures and spells for free, overwhelming the opponent with big threats. It includes cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Marang River Regent to pressure the opponent while also providing card advantage with Stock Up and Winternight Stories. The deck also includes protection with Spell Pierce and Spider-Sense, as well as some board control with Pyroclasm and Ill-Timed Explosion. The mana base includes a mix of lands to support the deck's colors and ensure smooth gameplay.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of counterspells, removal, and board wipes while utilizing card advantage engines like Tablet of Discovery and Stock Up to outvalue the opponent. The deck also aims to generate incremental advantage through the prowess ability of cards like Colorstorm Stallion and Molten-Core Maestro, ultimately overpowering the opponent with a mix of control elements and efficient threats. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure consistent access to both red and blue mana sources for optimal spell casting.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a strong board presence and overwhelming the opponent with efficient creatures. The goal is to use mana acceleration from cards like Llanowar Elves to quickly establish a commanding position on the battlefield. Key cards like Badgermole Cub and Mossborn Hydra provide powerful threats that can quickly end the game if left unchecked. The deck also includes some removal spells like Royal Treatment and Meltstrider's Resolve to deal with opposing threats and ensure victory.

The main concept of the deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy using creatures like Badgermole Cub and Spider Manifestation. The deck also has support cards like Gene Pollinator and Brightglass Gearhulk to further enhance its aggro potential. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Nature's Rhythm and Seam Rip to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The overall goal is to establish board presence quickly and efficiently, while also having some late-game power with cards like Craterhoof Behemoth and Ouroboroid.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with a combination of low-cost creatures and spells that can boost their power. By utilizing cards like Callous Sell-Sword, Elusive Otter, and Slickshot Show-Off, as well as spells like Turn Inside Out and Wild Ride, you can exert early pressure and close out the game swiftly. The inclusion of cards like Boomerang Basics and Stormchaser's Talent adds versatility and control options to the deck, allowing you to adapt to different situations and maintain your aggressive strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a wide range of Allies with aggressive abilities to quickly build a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent. By combining powerful Ally creatures like Earth Kingdom Protectors and South Pole Voyager with support cards like Celestial Reunion and Allies at Last, this deck aims to consistently apply pressure and maintain control of the game. The mana base of Breeding Pool, Cavern of Souls, and various other lands ensures that the deck can reliably play its spells and creatures on curve.

The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of removal spells, card draw, and counter spells to control the game and out value the opponent. By efficiently managing resources and utilizing card advantage, the deck aims to stall the game until it can establish a strong board presence or win condition. Utilizing the powerful Izzet color combination, the deck is able to deal with a variety of threats while also having access to powerful card advantage tools and efficient removal options. Additionally, the deck includes a few key finishers to close out games once it has gained control.

The main objective of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells to outvalue and outlast the opponent. By utilizing cards like Gran-Gran, Monument to Endurance, and Accumulate Wisdom to generate advantage, as well as Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson to deal with threats, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while building towards a powerful late-game win condition. With a mix of tempo and control elements, this Izzet Control deck seeks to maintain board presence and card advantage to secure victory.

The deck focuses on aggressively using cheap spells and creatures to quickly build up damage and control the board. It aims to control the game early with disruptive spells like Spell Pierce and Burst Lightning, while quickly developing a board presence with Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab. The deck then looks to close out the game with efficient creatures and burn spells like Boomerang Basics and Roaring Furnace/Steaming Sauna. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure smooth and consistent gameplay, allowing for easy access to all the necessary colors of mana.

The main focus of this Jeskai Control deck is to maintain board control and outvalue opponents through a combination of removal spells, card draw, and counterspells. The deck aims to answer threats efficiently while generating card advantage to pull ahead in the late game. The inclusion of versatile removal spells like Lightning Helix and Inevitable Defeat, along with card draw options like Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation, allows the deck to adapt to various situations and ultimately outlast the opponent in a battle of attrition.

The core strategy of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to establish early board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, supported by card draw from Keen-Eyed Curator. Ouroboroid and Pawpatch Recruit help maintain momentum, while Gene Pollinator and Brightglass Gearhulk provide powerful late-game threats. The deck also features some utility cards like Soul-Guide Lantern for graveyard hate and Meltstrider's Resolve for evasion. Using a mix of creature aggression and strategic spellcasting, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly and efficiently.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with low-cost creatures and using pump spells to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing creatures with strong abilities like Dyadrine and Surrak, as well as efficient mana ramp with Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. With a mix of aggression and evasion provided by cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Escape Tunnel, the deck seeks to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. The lands in the deck are optimized for consistent mana fixing and acceleration.

This deck focuses on utilizing the reanimation abilities of cards like  Bringer of the Last Gift and Overlord of the Balemurk to bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard. By combining these reanimation effects with cards like Deceit and Formidable Speaker to manipulate graveyard and hand interactions, the deck aims to create powerful combos and overwhelm opponents with high-value creatures. Additionally, the deck includes support cards like Wastewood Verge and Cavern of Souls to provide mana fixing and protection for its key combo pieces.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to utilize a combination of spells and abilities to control the board and outvalue your opponent. By using cards such as Gran-Gran and Monument to Endurance to generate card advantage, along with removal spells like Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson, the deck aims to maintain control of the game. Additionally, cards like Abandon Attachments and Consult the Star Charts provide additional utility and card selection, while cards like Boomerang Basics and Iroh's Demonstration offer versatile answers to various threats. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the game and overwhelming the opponent with powerful spells.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a variety of spells and abilities to outmaneuver and outlast opponents. By effectively managing resources and utilizing powerful spells such as Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson, the player aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and gain a tactical advantage. The deck also includes cards that allow for card draw and searching for key pieces, enhancing the control aspect of the deck. Overall, the goal is to control the pace of the game and come out on top through smart decision-making and strategic plays.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize cheap spells and evasion creatures to quickly deal damage to the opponent. By generating early pressure with creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, and backing them up with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of card draw and bounce spells like Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Boomerang Basics helps maintain consistency and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes a touch of versatility with cards like Secret Identity and Prismari Charm.

The main focus of this deck is utilizing the power of quick and efficient spells alongside creatures with evasive abilities to overwhelm the opponent with damage. By quickly deploying threats that are difficult to block or counter, the deck aims to close out games before the opponent can establish a strong defense. Additionally, the deck includes cards that provide card advantage and additional flexibility to maintain pressure on the opponent. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive nature of the deck while still allowing for a variety of spell options.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly establish a board presence with low-cost, aggressive creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab, and then support them with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm to control the opponent's board. This deck aims to maintain tempo and apply pressure early on through efficient card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand, while also disrupting the opponent's plays with counter spells like Spell Pierce. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy with a mix of Islands, Riverpyre Verge, Spirebluff Canal, Steam Vents, and Multiversal Passage.

This deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost spells to deal direct damage to the opponent while controlling the board with bounce and counter spells. It also features cards that grant card advantage and help dig through the deck for essential pieces. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless stream of spells and tempo plays, utilizing cheap creatures and burn spells to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. Additionally, the deck includes a land base that ensures consistent mana production and access to different colors if needed.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with cheap, efficient creatures and spells. By using cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early on and maintain that pressure throughout the game. Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent provide additional ways to deal damage and control the board. The deck also includes bounce and draw spells like Boomerang Basics and Opt to keep the momentum going. With a mix of aggression and control elements, this deck aims to secure a quick victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle using low-cost creatures and spells. By utilizing cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, as well as Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics for removal and disruption, you can maintain control of the battlefield while dealing direct damage to your opponent. The addition of cards like Flow State and Stormchaser's Talent allows you to further pressure your opponent and push for victory quickly. Ultimately, the goal is to outpace your opponent and secure a win through relentless aggression.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. By utilizing cheap and efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, as well as creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to maintain control of the board while steadily bring the opponent's life total down. The inclusion of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Get Out, as well as countermagic like Spell Pierce, adds extra disruption to the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to close out games quickly and efficiently through a combination of direct damage and creature aggression.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of efficient removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. Eddymurk Crab, Hearth Elemental, and Sunderflock provide early game defense, while cards like Opt, Prismari Charm, and Sleight of Hand help to filter through the deck and find key pieces. Burst Lightning and Spell Snare serve as removal and disruption, while Traumatic Critique and Impractical Joke can help to disrupt the opponent's hand and board state. Winternight Stories can provide a powerful late-game finisher, while the land base ensures consistent mana production.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of countering opponent's spells, removing threats, and drawing cards. It aims to survive until it can play powerful late-game spells like Day of Judgment and Jeskai Revelation to swing the game in its favor. The deck also includes cards like Tablet of Discovery and Stock Up to help with card advantage and resource management. Overall, the deck seeks to outlast opponents through a mix of resource denial and card advantage, ultimately leading to victory through a well-managed game plan.

The main focus of this Jeskai Control deck is to control the opponent's board with a variety of removal spells while also utilizing card draw and library manipulation to ensure consistency in drawing answers. The deck includes a mix of direct damage, board wipes, and graveyard hate to handle a wide range of threats. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the three-color identity of the deck and ensure smooth mana curves for casting spells efficiently. Overall, the strategy revolves around patiently controlling the game and out-valuing the opponent.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider, along with the support of Wistfulness and Vibrance, the deck aims to quickly deal damage to the opponent. Cards like Burst Lightning and Ill-Timed Explosion provide additional direct damage, while Roaming Throne and Deceit help control the board. The deck also includes land support and some utility spells to ensure consistency and flexibility in gameplay.

This deck focuses on quickly building a strong board presence with low-cost creatures and using pump spells to overwhelm the opponent. The creatures in the deck have abilities that help each other grow, creating a synergistic and aggressive strategy. By utilizing mana ramping cards like Llanowar Elves and efficient combat tricks like Seam Rip and Meltstrider's Resolve, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently, putting pressure on the opponent and forcing them to respond or be overrun. The mana base is consistent to ensure a smooth curve of plays.

This deck focuses on creating a fast and aggressive board presence with a combination of low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, supported by ramp cards like Llanowar Elves. The key strategy is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with creature buffs like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension, while also utilizing powerful creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Surrak, Elusive Hunter for additional pressure. The deck also includes some control elements with cards like Erode and Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the mana base is optimized for consistent casting of spells and creatures.

The key concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent quickly with a combination of efficient creatures and powerful combat tricks. By utilizing cards like Badgermole Cub and Ouroboroid to apply early pressure, along with cards like Gene Pollinator and Brightglass Gearhulk to maintain board presence, the deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. With access to cards like Nature's Rhythm and Seam Rip for removal, as well as cards like Keen-Eyed Curator for card advantage, this Selesnya Aggro deck is designed to be fast and efficient in taking down opponents.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game using a combination of spells and abilities from the Izzet color combination. By utilizing cards that offer card advantage and removal, the deck aims to keep opponents from developing their board while establishing its own. The deck also includes cards that help generate mana and fix the player's draws, ensuring a smooth and consistent gameplay experience. Additionally, there are cards that provide additional options and versatility in different situations, allowing for adaptability and strategic decision-making during matches.

The main focus of this Izzet control deck is to use a combination of card advantage, removal, and counter spells to control the game and outlast the opponent. It relies on generating value from cards like Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent while efficiently dealing with threats using Combustion Technique and Iroh's Demonstration. Additionally, the deck includes a mix of draw spells like Consult the Star Charts and It'll Quench Ya! to maintain card advantage. The mana base is built to ensure consistent access to both blue and red mana sources for casting spells.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of spell-based removal, card draw, and powerful creatures. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent's plans with counterspells and removal while building up card advantage and board presence through card draw and efficient creatures. By managing resources effectively and outlasting the opponent, the deck aims to secure victory through a combination of control and tempo plays. The deck also features a mix of aggressive and defensive options to adapt to different matchups and situations.

This deck focuses on utilizing control cards to manage the opponent's board while generating card advantage through draw spells and removal. The goal is to outlast the opponent by efficiently countering threats and maintaining card advantage until the late game, where powerful spells and finishers can take over the game. The deck also includes a mix of creature removal and counter spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect key pieces of the deck. Additionally, the mana base is designed to provide consistent access to both blue and red mana sources to cast spells effectively.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively control the board and disrupt your opponent's strategy with efficient creatures and powerful spells, while also maintaining card advantage and flexibility in your plays. By utilizing a mix of direct damage, card draw, and tempo plays, you aim to overwhelm your opponent with a fast and versatile gameplay style. Through a combination of evasion, removal, and efficient threats, you strive to stay ahead in the game and secure victory before your opponent can stabilize.

This UR aggro deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence with cheap creatures and utilizing efficient spells to control the board and deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Utilizing evasive creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, along with versatile spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and keep the opponent on their back foot. The main focus of this deck is to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy using a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. By utilizing cards like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental to control the board, Sunderflock to remove threats, and Opt and Sleight of Hand to maintain card advantage, the deck aims to outlast the opponent until it can either overwhelm them with a sudden burst of damage or grind them down with attrition. Additionally, cards like Traumatic Critique and Prismari Charm provide additional versatility and disruption to keep the opponent off balance.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a variety of spells and abilities to manipulate the board state and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It includes a mix of removal spells, card draw, counterspells, and board wipes to maintain control of the game and outvalue the opponent. The deck also incorporates a small selection of win conditions to close out the game once it has established control. With a diverse mana base and a range of versatile spells, the deck aims to adapt to different threats and strategies in order to come out ahead in the matchup.

The deck focuses on using various spell cards to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Cards like Consult the Star Charts and Jeskai Revelation provide card advantage and help dig for key pieces. Thunder Magic and Pyroclasm act as removal spells to deal with threats, while Swallowed by Leviathan can reset the board. Tablet of Discovery helps filter through the deck, and Stock Up provides additional resources. The deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and spells to overwhelm the opponent quickly. By using cards like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, the deck is able to establish a fast board presence and apply pressure early on. Additionally, cards like Erode and Earthbender Ascension can help control the board and clear the way for attacking with powerful creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Bristly Bill, Spine Sower. The deck focuses on using low cost creatures like Llanowar Elves and Badgermole Cub to quickly build a board presence, while utilizing pump spells like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension to enhance their power. Sazh's Chocobo and Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam provide additional aggression, while cards like Erode and Bushwhack help to push through damage and finish off the opponent. The deck also includes land cards that assist in mana fixing and ramping up your resources. With a mix of powerful creatures and strategic spells, this deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain dominance throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying efficient creatures to apply early pressure on the opponent. It utilizes mana ramping with Llanowar Elves and efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo to quickly build a board presence. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Erode to handle opposing threats. Earthbender Ascension can help buff up creatures for a final push, while cards like Mossborn Hydra and Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam provide late-game threats. The main focus of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly establish a strong board presence by playing low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub, Llanowar Elves, and Ouroboroid. The deck also contains cards like Pawpatch Recruit, Sage of the Skies, and Gene Pollinator to continue putting pressure on the opponent. Additionally, cards like Brightglass Gearhulk and Keen-Eyed Curator provide additional power and utility to the deck. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing a mix of creatures and spells to secure victory.

This deck focuses on fast, efficient creatures that can quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggression. By playing low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, the deck aims to build a board presence quickly and maintain pressure on the opponent. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension help to boost the power of your creatures, while spells like Erode and Bushwhack can provide additional reach to finish off the opponent. With a mix of creatures and spells, this deck aims to outpace the opponent and secure a fast victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing creatures with strong abilities to quickly overwhelm the opponent and deal damage efficiently. It combines aggression with Simic's ability to ramp and control the battlefield. The deck includes cards that boost mana production, provide card draw, and give creatures evasion or protection. The goal is to establish a strong board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game, eventually finishing off the opponent with powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth or Marang River Regent. The deck also includes some utility cards to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect its own creatures.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of cards that allow for powerful creatures to be brought back from the graveyard, known as reanimation, to overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Deceit and Winternight Stories to bring back creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Overlord of the Balemurk, the deck aims to create a strong board presence and control the game. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Emeritus of Ideation and Requiting Hex provide support and disruption to further enhance the deck's strategy.

The deck focuses on utilizing combo pieces to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures from the graveyard. By using cards like Deceit and Doomsday Excruciator in conjunction with Superior Spider-Man and Bitter Triumph, the player can bring back key creatures for a powerful offensive strategy. Cards like Day of Black Sun and Winternight Stories help control the board while setting up the combo. The deck also utilizes protection and card advantage cards like Deadly Cover-Up and Stock Up to ensure the combo goes off smoothly.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly playing low cost creatures and spells to deal damage to the opponent efficiently. With a mix of creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Colorstorm Stallion, along with spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, the deck aims to control the board and apply pressure to the opponent early in the game. Utilizing cards like Boomerang Basics and Stormchaser's Talent, this deck aims to maintain tempo and keep the opponent on the back foot while steadily chipping away at their life total.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of low-cost, fast creatures and quickly build up a board presence. By utilizing cards like Springleaf Drum and Erode to accelerate mana production and removal, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while buffing its own creatures with cards like Starfield Shepherd and Haliya, Guided by Light. The inclusion of cards like Arachne, Psionic Weaver and Voice of Victory provides additional utility and control options, making it a versatile and aggressive deck to play against.
